name: Grilled Snapper with an Herb Salad
recipeIngredient: Whole Fish, such as Snapper, Bream, sea bass, porgy
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the grill.
2. Clean and gut the fish, removing the top and bottom fins, scales, and gills.
3. Brush one tablespoon of olive oil onto the fish and place it on the grill.
4. Cook until done, about 20 to 25 minutes, turning once.
5. Meanwhile, toss the herbs and flowers in a mixing bowl.
6. Add the remaining two tablespoons of olive oil, lemon zest, lemon juice, salt, and pepper to taste. Toss and set aside.
7. When the fish is done, remove it to a serving platter.
8. Garnish with the herb salad and serve with additional oil and lemon juice.
Yield: 4 servings
